'''Imperial cargo ships''' were [[Starship/Legends|starships]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to [[Transport/Legends|transport]] military supplies.

==Characteristics==
The cargo ship model was based around a heavily modified [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] left over from the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="RECG" /> with additional [[Engine/Legends|thrusters]] and changed outer hull structure.<ref name="SWR:MBME" /> The ships sacrificed many of their weaponry emplacements to carry additional tons of cargo.<ref name="RECG" />

==History==
[[File:Impcargo-kihraxz-recg.jpg|thumb|left|150px|A Imperial cargo ship under attack by a pair of [[Kihraxz assault fighter|Kihraxz starfighters]]]]
Following the end of hostilities between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the remaining [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist Alliance]], an amount of ''Acclamator''-class vessels were modified to become cargo vessels and supply ships. This followed the Empire's policy of adapting and modifying equipment to suit the new post-war peacekeeping duties.<ref name="RECG" />

Four of these ships were [[Raid on an Imperial cargo convoy|hijacked]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during a convoy run, with the ships and their cargo confiscated by the Alliance. They were later destroyed in a [[Disaster at Deepspace Besh|battle]] with the Empire.<ref name="SWR:MBME" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Imperial cargo ship appears in the ''[[Star Wars: Rebellion: My Brother, My Enemy]]'' comic book arc.

==Appearances==
*[[Rebellion 2|''Rebellion'' 2]] {{1st}}
*[[Rebellion 4|''Rebellion'' 4]]
*[[Rebellion 5|''Rebellion'' 5]]
